disambiguated.context: There's a Moldovan woman and a Japanese woman who work at desks right next to each other. They get along really well, but the women are pretty different from each other. The Moldovan woman is soft spoken, shy, and never confronts anyone, even when the other person is clearly in the wrong. The Japanese woman, on the other hand, speaks her mind pretty freely. She's not aggressive, but people definitely know where they stand with her.
